about.name: Nick Tagliasacchi
about.title: Director of Engineering | SaaS, Platform, and Scale
about.summary: Engineering leader with 13 years of software engineering experience and 6 years leading distributed teams building large-scale, security-sensitive SaaS platforms. Proven track record modernizing architecture, scaling engineering execution, and driving delivery in complex environments through strong technical judgment and cross-functional leadership.

roles.title: Technical Lead, Supply Chain Defense Platform
highlights: Owned technical direction and delivery for a security-critical SaaS supply chain defense platform serving enterprise customers in regulated industries
Acted as final decision-maker for architectural tradeoffs, guiding platform scalability, performance, and operational risk management

Established and enforced engineering standards across multiple teams supporting the platform, including frontend/backend collaboration workflows, GraphQL API integration practices, release processes, and CI/CD pipelines, improving delivery consistency and stabilizing execution during backend leadership transitions

Partnered with product, design, and executive leadership (Director, VP, and CISO stakeholders) to define roadmap priorities, align platform architecture and delivery with enterprise security objectives

roles.title: Technical Lead, Managed Detection & Response
highlights: Led engineering for systems supporting managed detection and response workflows, enabling high-volume alerting and triage operations for enterprise security teams
Served as escalation point for production incidents, guiding technical response and authoring post-incident reports to drive systemic improvements
Made final architectural decisions for public and internal APIs supporting the SaaS platform. Environment design across development, quality assurance, pre-production, and production systems
Led annual disaster recovery exercises validating failover procedures and platform resilience

roles.title: Offshore Engineering Team Lead, Client Applications Team
highlights: Built and led an offshore engineering team in Slovakia (3 engineers), establishing hiring standards and execution practices while expanding engineering capacity and enabling distributed delivery across multiple teams (2-5 engineers each) spanning EU and US time zones
Owned delivery outcomes across multiple workstreams, coordinating priorities between US-based stakeholders and offshore engineers
Implemented agile execution practices to improve predictability, delivery throughput, and team autonomy

roles.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer, Client Applications Team
highlights: Led development of customer-facing SaaS features for a security platform, improving scalability and usability across enterprise customer workflows
Partnered closely with product and design to translate requirements into resilient, maintainable implementations

roles.title: MSS Software Engineer
highlights: Built and maintained backend services supporting managed security operations, emphasizing reliability and data integrity
Gained deep exposure to SOC workflows, alert pipelines, and operational constraints in enterprise security environments

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer (Consultant)
highlights: Delivered enterprise-grade financial systems for AIG through DOOR3 consultancy in a highly regulated environment
Partnered with client stakeholders to translate complex requirements into secure, maintainable implementations
Contributed to architectural decisions balancing compliance, scalability, and delivery speed

roles.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Led migration of a legacy bug tracking system to Jira, improving reporting accuracy and workflow efficiency
Built proof-of-concept Electronic Health Record features with dynamic, interactive data visualizations
Worked closely with product and engineering leadership to identify process risks and delivery improvements

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

skills.Engineering Leadership: Distributed teams, cross-functional execution, hiring & mentoring, roadmap execution, stakeholder alignment
skills.Platform & Architecture: Microservices, distributed systems, cloud infrastructure, API design, GraphQL, event-driven architectures, SaaS
skills.Security & Operations: Security platforms, incident response, disaster recovery testing, risk management, CI/CD
skills.Technologies: Golang, Vue, React, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Splunk
skills.Artificial Intelligence: LLMs, RAG pipelines, AI workflow orchestration, prompt engineering, MCP, secure AI environments

projects.name: nicktag.tech
projects.description: Personal portfolio and micro-frontend playground built as a Bun monorepo with Vue 3, Module Federation, and an interactive terminal-based resume explorer
